_note: The 19-slot paperdoll (docs/design/EQUIPMENT_PAPERDOLL.md). Rows here fold ADDITIVELY onto ProtoGear.CATALOG at boot — a new id becomes real gear. Reusing a code-floor id is ignored (code wins). slot must be one of ProtoGear.SLOTS; soak is a relative 0..1 armor cut over the body parts in covers.

gear.name: Composite combat shell
gear.desc: White-Coat composite. The best torso plate this side of a Redoubt.

gear.name: Full gas mask
gear.desc: Seals the face slot. Toxin/rad resist lands when the survival layers arrive.
